title: Lakes, Saunas & Arctic Magic
description: A peaceful northern country of vast forests, clean lakes, sauna culture, design cities, snowy Lapland, and aurora-filled winter skies.

bestTime.description: Best for lakes, cottages, sauna, kayaking, hiking, and long daylight.
Best for Lapland, snow resorts, reindeer, husky safaris, glass igloos, and northern lights.

highlights.title: Rovaniemi & Santa Claus Village
highlights.subtitle: Arctic Circle
highlights.description: A Lapland destination known for Santa Claus Village, reindeer, huskies, glass igloos, and snowy adventures.

highlights.title: Finnish Lakeland
highlights.subtitle: Lakes & Saunas
highlights.description: A calm region of forests, cottages, lakes, canoeing, and traditional Finnish sauna culture.

highlights.title: Suomenlinna Sea Fortress
highlights.subtitle: UNESCO Maritime Heritage
highlights.description: A historic fortress spread across islands near Helsinki, reachable by a short ferry ride.

destinations.name: Helsinki
destinations.description: Finland’s seaside capital is known for Nordic design, markets, architecture, islands, cafés, and coastal culture.

destinations.name: Rovaniemi
destinations.description: The capital of Finnish Lapland and gateway to Arctic adventures, Santa Claus Village, and northern lights trips.

destinations.name: Santa Claus Village
destinations.description: A famous Arctic Circle attraction near Rovaniemi where visitors can meet Santa and enjoy winter activities.

destinations.name: Suomenlinna Sea Fortress
destinations.description: An 18th-century sea fortress and UNESCO site across islands outside Helsinki.

destinations.name: Lake Saimaa
destinations.description: Finland’s largest lake region, known for cottages, forests, sauna, kayaking, and peaceful slow travel.

destinations.name: Levi
destinations.description: A popular Lapland ski resort offering slopes, snow activities, aurora experiences, and winter lodges.

destinations.name: Porvoo
destinations.description: A charming old town known for colorful riverside warehouses, cobbled streets, cafés, and historic wooden houses.

destinations.name: Turku
destinations.description: Finland’s oldest city, known for its riverside atmosphere, castle, cathedral, museums, and archipelago access.

destinations.name: Nuuksio National Park
destinations.description: A forest-and-lake national park near Helsinki, ideal for short hikes, nature escapes, and quiet scenery.

destinations.name: Kakslauttanen
destinations.description: A Lapland resort area famous for glass igloos, aurora viewing, snowy forests, and Arctic stays.

destinations.name: Oulanka National Park
destinations.description: A scenic national park known for rivers, suspension bridges, waterfalls, and the Karhunkierros hiking trail.

destinations.name: Åland Islands
destinations.description: A Swedish-speaking island region between Finland and Sweden, known for cycling, sea views, and island life.

experiences.title: Sleep Under the Aurora in a Glass Igloo
Meet Reindeer and Huskies in Lapland
Explore the Finnish Lakeland by Canoe

travelTips.title: Experience a traditional sauna
travelTips.text: Sauna culture is an essential part of Finnish life and a must-try cultural experience.

travelTips.title: Prepare for seasonal extremes
travelTips.text: Summers offer endless daylight, while winters bring long nights and freezing temperatures.

travelTips.title: Pack for outdoor adventures
travelTips.text: Finland's lakes, forests, and national parks are best enjoyed with proper outdoor clothing and footwear.
